center.name: 美國東北部
center.summary: 美國東北部是图谱中的地点节点，当前关联3种鸟类，包括黃腹吸汁啄木鳥、Blackpoll warbler、加拿大威尔逊森莺，主要用于表示这些物种的分布地、停歇地或观测地。

birds.label: 分布于
birds.evidence: The blackpoll breeds in forests of northern North America, from Alaska throughout most of Canada, to the Adirondack Mountains of New York as well as New England in the Northeastern United States

birds.label: 分布于
birds.evidence: It summers in Canada and northeastern United States and winters in northern South America

birds.label: 分布于
birds.evidence: The yellow-bellied sapsucker is found across Canada, eastern Alaska and the northeastern United States
